name: iso-27001-ai
description: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Information Security Management System compliance server. Audit against all 93 Annex A controls across 4 themes, perform ISO 27005 risk assessments, run gap analysis, generate Statement of Applicability, classify security incidents, and crosswalk to ISO 42001 for AI-specific requirements. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: audit_isms
tools.description: Audit an Information Security Management System against ISO 27001:2022

tools.name: risk_assessment
tools.description: Perform information security risk assessment per ISO 27005 methodology.

tools.name: gap_analysis
tools.description: Compare current controls to ISO 27001:2022 requirements and identify gaps.

tools.name: crosswalk_to_ai
tools.description: Map ISO 27001 controls to AI-specific requirements via ISO 42001 bridge.

tools.name: generate_soa
tools.description: Generate a Statement of Applicability (SoA) per ISO 27001:2022 clause 6.1.3(d).

tools.name: incident_classification
tools.description: Classify security incidents per ISO 27001 incident management framework
